name: Exxon Mobil Smart Card+™ Credit Card
network: PROPRIETARY (Exxon Mobil / Citi Retail Services — closed-loop, not Visa or Mastercard)
points_program: Instant fuel discount + statement credit (no points currency)
effective_cost: Free — no annual fee, but usable only at Exxon and Mobil branded stations

verdict.text: Only makes sense if you fuel up almost exclusively at Exxon/Mobil

earn_rates.category: Synergy Supreme+™ premium gasoline at Exxon & Mobil stations
Regular, mid-grade & diesel fuel at Exxon & Mobil stations
Convenience-store purchases at Exxon/Mobil (snacks, drinks, car washes) — first $1,200/yr, then presumably 0%

earn_note: This is a closed-loop, proprietary card — it isn't a Visa or Mastercard and can't be used anywhere except participating Exxon and Mobil branded stations. There's no earning at all outside Exxon/Mobil, no general-purpose base rate, and no signup bonus. The 5% convenience-store credit excludes fuel, lottery tickets, money orders, and gift cards, and caps at $1,200 in qualifying spend per year ($60 max credit). Discounts stack with the separate Exxon Mobil Rewards+ loyalty program.

points.currency: None — instant per-gallon discount plus a capped statement credit

redemption_options.method: Fuel discount applied instantly at the pump
5% statement credit on qualifying convenience-store purchases, up to $1,200/yr in spend

points.per_100k: Not applicable — value is a per-gallon cents-off discount and a capped statement credit, not a points balance
points.note: There's no points balance to redeem or track — the fuel discount posts automatically at checkout, and the convenience-store credit posts as a monthly statement credit up to its $1,200/year spend cap. Nothing here is portable or worth anything outside an Exxon/Mobil fuel purchase.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer partners — this is a closed-loop discount card with no points currency of any kind to transfer.

protection_note: No purchase, warranty, or travel protections of any kind — this is a closed-loop fuel-discount card, not a Visa/Mastercard, so none of the usual network-level benefits apply. $0 liability on unauthorized charges is the only fraud-related protection found.
rental_note: No rental car coverage — the card can't be used for rentals or anywhere outside participating Exxon/Mobil stations.

services.name: Instant pump discount
services.detail: 12¢/gal off Synergy Supreme+ premium and 10¢/gal off regular/mid-grade/diesel, applied automatically at the pump — no signup process or minimum spend required to activate.

services.name: Stacks with Exxon Mobil Rewards+
services.detail: Can be combined with the separate Exxon Mobil Rewards+ loyalty program, and is compatible with regional grocery fuel-rewards programs (e.g. Albertsons/Safeway/ACME/Shaw's/Star Market for U).

services.name: Online account management
services.detail: Review charges and schedule payments through Citi's retail-card online portal.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users
additional_cards.note: No distinct authorized-user program or benefit was found for this card.

timeline.text: Standard APR runs notably high for a fuel card (roughly 33% variable as of late 2025 disclosures), with no introductory APR period offered — this card is built for people who pay in full monthly and fuel up almost exclusively at Exxon/Mobil, not for carrying a balance.
